software.name: batstar
software.notes: [keyboard] doesn't seem to work properly in game

software.name: canyonkl
software.notes: Prompts for showing info at title, doesn't seem to work (verify, missing tape part?)

software.name: carrace
software.notes: [keyboard] claims to use IJKM for movement but none do work

software.name: eliza
software.notes: [tape] randomly fails if INFO menu is loaded

software.name: fraxxono
software.notes: Maps right movement to up key (verify)

software.name: lettbord
software.notes: [keyboard] inputs stop working at game rules screen ("spelregels")

software.name: maanlan2
software.notes: [keyboard] looks unresponsive on gameplay, assume key digits are required

software.name: memory
software.notes: Wants [display] 80 width support or scrolling during gameplay

software.name: puzzelen
software.notes: Asks for CODE and STOP that aren't mapped on [keyboard]

info.name: usage
info.value: Press M or Z if wanting borders or not

info.name: usage
info.value: Press M or Z if wanting borders or not

info.name: usage
info.value: Need to set screen to a meaningful value (like 20 lines, 40 characters)

software.name: speelis
software.notes: Requires 2x [paddle], hangs once ball goes at edge

software.name: surround
software.notes: Black screen after title, press any key to proceed (verify)

software.name: tennis
software.notes: 2 players game Left paddle moves with left shift and left arrow Right paddle moves with right shift and right arrow Starts with keypad 3 (START) All of the above doesn't translate well with the actual p2000 keyboard but btanb

software.name: vliegen
software.notes: Wants [display] 80 width support? Green plane take off over green layer? (verify)

software.name: yahtzee
software.notes: Requesting instructions at startup will puke back to BASIC prompt, bad dump?
